tools.name: book_appointment
tools.description: Books a new appointment or consultation on the law firm's Google Calendar. Use this when a client wants to schedule a meeting, consultation, or hearing with a lawyer.

lawyer_name.description: Name of the specific lawyer requested, if any

notes.description: Brief description of the matter or any special notes

tools.name: check_availability
tools.description: Checks available appointment slots on the calendar for a given date or date range. Use this before booking to confirm a time slot is free.

date.description: Date to check in YYYY-MM-DD format

lawyer_name.description: Specific lawyer to check availability for, if requested

tools.name: forward_call
tools.description: Transfers the live phone call to a specific lawyer or staff member. Use this when the caller explicitly asks to speak with someone, or when the matter requires immediate legal attention.

target_employee.description: Name or role of the employee to forward to (e.g. 'John Smith', 'senior partner', 'reception')

reason.description: Brief reason for the transfer, spoken to the employee before connecting

caller_name.description: Name of the caller being transferred

tools.name: take_message
tools.description: Logs a message from the caller into the client records Google Sheet and sends an SMS notification to the relevant lawyer or staff member.

message_for.description: Name of the lawyer or staff member the message is intended for

message_body.description: The full message content as dictated by the caller

tools.name: lookup_client
tools.description: Looks up an existing client's records in Google Sheets by name or phone number. Use this to personalise the conversation and retrieve case reference numbers.

tools.name: send_confirmation
tools.description: Sends an SMS or email confirmation to a client after an appointment is booked or a message is taken.

recipient_phone.description: Phone number to send SMS to

recipient_email.description: Email address to send confirmation to, if provided

appointment_details.description: Appointment details object (date, time, lawyer, type) — required for appointment confirmations
